⚠️ Kontrol Edilmesi Gereken Yayınlar
performance(embeddings): add a reusable model-loading strategy that avoids repeated heavy initialization across commands
feature(setup): allow setup --yes to enable automatic memory hooks per client instead of only all-or-nothing
feature(graph-ui): add an .abhi diff inspector view in Graph Studio
security(memory): add configurable redaction rules before observe_conversation persists transcripts
feature(drive): let waggle pull choose a merge strategy instead of hard-coding last_write_wins
testing(neo4j): add parity coverage for transcript retrieval and temporal filters
performance(orchestrator): bound or evict _known_turn_ids so long-lived runtimes do not grow unbounded memory
feature(drive): add resumable uploads and retry handling for large .abhi Drive pushes
security(drive): store Google Drive OAuth tokens in the OS keychain or encrypted secret store
feature(abhi): include dangling edge target nodes during export instead of logging and continuing
testing(distribution): add CLI help coverage for export/push/pull/share commands
feature(server): add a --no-browser flow for Drive auth that prints the consent URL cleanly
tooling(labels): add a consistency check between .github/labels.yml and docs/good-first-issues.md label guidance
release(vscode-extension): add a smoke test that contributed commands remain registered in package.json
